title: viola × grandis
intro: Viola × grandis, also known as the hybrid violet or garden pansy, is a cultivated plant resulting from the cross between Viola sororia and Viola x wittrockiana. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Viola × grandis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Viola × grandis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
